heroHeadline: 1.4M Displaced as GSF Awaits Deployment; 5,519 Killed in 10 Months Per OHCHR
heroSubtitle: IOM confirms 40% surge in displacement to 1.4 million since end of 2024; Gang Suppression Force formal arrival expected April 2026 as MSS formally ends; Haiti's first elections in a decade scheduled August 30, 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from UN BINUH, OHCHR, OCHA, IOM, Reuters, AP, Miami Herald, Al Jazeera, Le Nouvelliste, ACLED, ICG, HRW, WFP, Haitian Times, Jamaica Observer
